positive: A cute, kawaii-style illustration of a group of anthropomorphic forest animals (a fox, a bear, and a rabbit) having a picnic in a sunny meadow. The style should be soft, pastel, and highly adorable, reminiscent of storybook book art, flat design, vibrant yet gentle colors.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, scary, gritty, high contrast
